_meta.description: Ontario family offices - recherche web publique 2026-05-07. Capital Norvex Inc. cible : single-family offices, multi-family offices, holding companies de familles fortunées qui placent du capital en immobilier privé commercial / hypothèques privées. Tickets 1M-50M$. Sources : Canadian Family Offices, sites corporatifs, LinkedIn pages publiques, presse (Globe Wealth, BNN, Forbes), CAFA.

familyOffices.name: Lawrence Tanenbaum
familyOffices.organization: Kilmer Van Nostrand Co. Limited / Kilmer Group
familyOffices.title: Chairman & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, real estate, infrastructure, sports & media investments across North America
familyOffices.approachAngle: Multi-billion family office avec déploiement immobilier prouvé — partenaire idéal pour gros calls de capital en commercial real estate
familyOffices.notes: Fondé Kilmer Group 1968. ~20B$ AUM. Contrôle 20% MLSE. Track record long en résidentiel/commercial/infrastructure.

familyOffices.name: Galen Weston
familyOffices.title: Controlling Shareholder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Real estate holdings, food & retail, alternative investments via family holding company
familyOffices.approachAngle: Holding $21B avec opérations immobilières — long-term hold mentality sur propriétés commerciales
familyOffices.notes: 3e génération (Weston). Contrôle Loblaws, Choice Properties REIT. ~21B$ AUM. Conservateur, long-term real estate holder.

familyOffices.name: Gerald Schwartz
familyOffices.organization: Onex Corporation / Schwartz Reisman Family Office
familyOffices.title: Founder & Chairman
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, real estate, credit and direct investments globally
familyOffices.approachAngle: Family office institutionnel avec plateforme RE dédiée — appétit prouvé pour structures complexes
familyOffices.notes: Fondateur Onex (1984). Marié à Heather Reisman (Indigo). Net worth 1.5B$+. Déploiement RE sophistiqué.

familyOffices.name: Aubrey Dan
familyOffices.title: Principal
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, private debt, real estate, hedge funds, infrastructure - 120+ funds
familyOffices.approachAngle: Single-family office 24+ ans gérant private debt et RE alongside PE — capital flexible disponible
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2000. Gère 3.9B$ across 120+ portfolio companies. Tony Award philanthropist. Infrastructure private debt prouvée.

familyOffices.name: Peter Thomson
familyOffices.title: Chairman & Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Real estate acquisitions (NNN properties 4M-15M$), venture capital, private equity globally
familyOffices.approachAngle: Family office Thomson Reuters avec fonds RE dédié Dallas — structures institutionnelles flexibles
familyOffices.notes: Famille Thomson Reuters (majority). Fondé 1996. 75+ private investments. Thomvest Properties depuis 2020.

familyOffices.name: Philip Reichmann
familyOffices.title: Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Global real estate investing (office, hotels, senior housing, student housing) via private equity
familyOffices.approachAngle: Famille multi-gen gérant héritage Olympia & York — expertise RE substantielle prouvée
familyOffices.notes: Family office Reichmann (Olympia & York legacy, 70M+ sq ft globally). Fondé 2005. Office/hotels/housing global.

familyOffices.name: Jim Balsillie
familyOffices.title: Co-Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Technology investing, residential real estate (Canada, US, Middle East), art and alternative assets
familyOffices.approachAngle: Billionaire FO avec 1.6B$+ AUM — investisseur sophistiqué avec track record RE
familyOffices.notes: BlackBerry co-founder/CEO (exit 2012). 1.6B$+ AUM. Heavy résidentiel RE Canada/US. Board MDA.

familyOffices.name: Michael Domb
familyOffices.title: Founder & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Multifamily real estate along Toronto transit corridors (Eglinton LRT focus)
familyOffices.approachAngle: FO spécialisé multifamily transit-oriented — match parfait pour partenariats financement Capital Norvex
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2014. FO gérant multifamily portfolio. Focus Eglinton LRT corridor + downtown Toronto.

familyOffices.name: Tom McCullough
familyOffices.title: Co-Founder & Chairman
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Integrated wealth, investment management, real estate & alternatives for families 10M-500M$+ NW
familyOffices.approachAngle: Plus grand multi-family office Canada — capacité institutionnelle RE pour familles UHNW
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2003. Plus grand MFO Canada. CI Financial majority stake (2022). Sert 500+ familles. Co-founder Scott Hayman aussi.

familyOffices.name: David Picton
familyOffices.title: Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Alternatives, hedge funds, fixed income, merger arbitrage, multi-asset strategies
familyOffices.approachAngle: Boutique 100% employee-owned 9.6B$ AUM — investisseurs sophistiqués avec exposure RE institutionnelle
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2004. 9.6B$ AUM. 100% employee-owned. Alt asset specialist. Great Place to Work 2020-2024.

familyOffices.name: Arthur Salzer
familyOffices.title: Founder & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Conflict-free investment management, estate planning, family governance, alternative investments
familyOffices.approachAngle: MFO indépendant 30+ ans expérience family office — allocateur capital sans biais pour RE et alternatives
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2011. Independent family-owned MFO. Bureaux Oakville & Calgary. Best MFO North America Award 2022.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Co-Founders / Managing Partners
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Tax-optimized private investments: hedge funds, PE, private debt, private real estate, specialty vehicles
familyOffices.approachAngle: MFO indépendant Toronto avec expertise RE et alternatives — focus familles affluentes, déploiement direct
familyOffices.notes: MFO privé indépendant Toronto. Founders investissent leur capital alongside clients. Tax optimization focus.

familyOffices.name: Neil Nisker & Tim Cestnick
familyOffices.title: Co-Founders
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Integrated wealth, investment, tax planning, real estate, PE for UHNW families
familyOffices.approachAngle: Premier shared family office Canada — services institutionnels avec focus RE et alternatives
familyOffices.notes: Shared family office model (premier au Canada). 3B$+ AUM. Partenariat Ballentine Partners global.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Leadership Team
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Real estate portfolio management, wealth planning, tax optimization, business valuation pour UHNW
familyOffices.approachAngle: FO multi-juridiction 8B$+ AUM avec expertise RE explicite — expansion Toronto signal appétit marché
familyOffices.notes: HQ Montréal (1926). 8B$ AUM. Family office services depuis 1999. Expansion Toronto 2024+. RE focus marketing.

familyOffices.name: Albert Soberano
familyOffices.organization: Sharno Group Inc. / Sharno Capital Corporation
familyOffices.title: Chairman
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Commercial real estate (industrial, retail), résidentiel (low/mid-rise), private equity GTA & Golden Horseshoe
familyOffices.approachAngle: FO familial avec focus GTA multifamily + commercial — ticket size aligné avec Capital Norvex
familyOffices.notes: Family office privé. Famille Soberano. GTA résidentiel & commercial. Registered Exempt Market Dealer.

familyOffices.name: à identifier

familyOffices.approachAngle: FO multi-asset avec portefeuille RE significatif — long-term hold aligned avec capital hypothécaire privé
familyOffices.notes: Private investment firm. Markham. Owned RE portfolio: industrial, rental, condo. PE et debt focus.

familyOffices.name: Lawrence Zucker
familyOffices.title: Chief Executive Officer
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Real estate, private equity, venture capital; control & minority equity structures across capital stack
familyOffices.approachAngle: FO Thomson Reuters (David Thomson chair) — plateforme RE billion$ avec sources institutionnelles
familyOffices.notes: Osmington Inc. fondé 1995. Affilié David Thomson (Thomson Reuters Chair). 91M$ resort acquisition (2024). Union Station redev.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Leadership Team
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Alternative assets: PE, real estate, private debt, VC, hedge funds pour UHNW families
familyOffices.approachAngle: Leading cross-border MFO 22B$+ AUM — plateforme institutionnelle RE accessible aux familles
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1998. HQ Toronto. 200+ familles NA. 22B$+ AUM. Partenariat iCapital alt fund admin.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Leadership Team
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, private debt, alternative investments pour préservation et croissance de richesse
familyOffices.approachAngle: Boutique FO 30+ ans avec expertise private debt — aligné avec thèse Capital Norvex
familyOffices.notes: Opérant 30+ ans (depuis 1994). Petit, service personnel. PE & debt specialist. Accès institutional-quality investments.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Leadership Team
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Real estate (hospitality, retail, commercial, résidentiel), PE, middle-market operating businesses
familyOffices.approachAngle: Single FO avec deep RE roots — property management & development expertise GTA
familyOffices.notes: Single family office. 3 plateformes opérationnelles (4M-10M$ EBITDA). Cash flowing business preference.

familyOffices.name: Geoff Beattie
familyOffices.title: Chairman & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Diverse financial management, investment services, private foundations management
familyOffices.approachAngle: Single FO famille Thomson — base capital institutionnelle avec infrastructure investissement sophistiquée
familyOffices.notes: Woodbridge Company (vehicule famille Thomson) president 1998-2012. Generation Capital CEO depuis 2013. 2 private foundations.

familyOffices.name: à identifier
familyOffices.title: Leadership Team
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Discretionary investment management, tax planning, estate planning, business succession pour pros et familles
familyOffices.approachAngle: MFO ON en croissance avec focus work-optional — accessible mid-market capital deployment
familyOffices.notes: Établi 2021. Ancaster HQ + Mississauga. Discretionary management. MFO en croissance ON.

familyOffices.approachAngle: Firme indépendante établie (1857) avec division FO dédiée — expérience multi-générationnelle
familyOffices.notes: Établi 1857. TSX-listed (RCG). Private FO Division explicite. 100 Queens Quay East, Toronto. Alt investing focus.

familyOffices.approachAngle: Firme globale 115B$+ assets avec présence Toronto — services institutionnels pour familles affluentes
familyOffices.notes: 115B$+ global client assets. 1.5B$+ revenu fiscal (2023). 47 bureaux 4 continents.

familyOffices.name: Tom Gaglardi
familyOffices.title: Owner / Leadership
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Hospitality (63 hôtels), real estate development, commercial/résidentiel property management NA
familyOffices.approachAngle: Plus gros groupe hospitality privé Canada (8B$ USD wealth) avec divisions RE — portefeuille Toronto
familyOffices.notes: Gaglardi family office (1952). 8B$ USD wealth estimé. 63 hôtels, 175 restos, Sutton Place Toronto, Northland Living. (Note: HQ BC mais présence ON forte)

familyOffices.name: Jonathan Goodman
familyOffices.title: Chairman & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Mining, merchant banking, real estate, energy, commodities, agriculture, infrastructure
familyOffices.approachAngle: Holding multi-gen avec 600M$+ merchant banking capital — Dundee REIT et Merchant Bank RE focus
familyOffices.notes: TSX-listed. Fondé 1991 (Ned Goodman). Famille Goodman 99% common shares. Dundee Merchant Bank 600M$+ RE focus.

familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1998. Firme financière régulée. Private debt et credit specialist. HQ Toronto.

familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1955. 62.3B$ AUM. Détenu par Scotiabank (2018). Bureau Toronto. HNW individuels avec intérêts RE significatifs.

familyOffices.name: à identifier

familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1984. Acquis Onex 2019. Private wealth teams transition vers RBC. Legacy Toronto HNW family office practice.

familyOffices.name: Timothy Burt
familyOffices.title: Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Long-term alternative investments pour individuels, familles, holdings corp, trusts; equity focus
familyOffices.approachAngle: Boutique investissement Toronto 5.2B$ AUM — alt investment specialist pour family offices
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1992. 5.2B$ AUM (juin 2025). 84 staff, 12 CFA. Alt investment specialist. Family offices et corps.

familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1996. 10B$+ AUM. 100 King St W, Suite 5900, Toronto. Boutique indépendant.

familyOffices.notes: Single family office. Acquisitions GTA. Hospitalité, retail, commercial RE holdings. Diversification active.
